content:
# Session 6 (iter-006) — review

## Metadata
- Iter/session: 006 / session_6. Model: claude-opus-4-8.
- Sorry count: **16 → 16** (no sorry closed; **no new sorry**; no `axiom`).
- Lanes: 1 prover (`grassmannianScheme` GlueData BUILD, mathlib-build).
- Files touched: `MR2223407ConstructionHilbertQuot/Functors.lean` (only).
- Build green (8476 jobs). `lean_verify` on new decls: only `propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound`.

## Target: `grassmannianScheme (r d : ℕ) : Scheme.{u}` — PARTIAL
mathlib-build of the Grassmannian via `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.GlueData`, 6-step recipe in
`def:grassmannian-scheme`. **Substantial progress: 22 new genuine, axiom-free helper
declarations** implementing the entire bottom data layer (recipe steps 1–5: GlueData `U`/`V`/`f`/`t`
data fields + the `f_open` open-immersion field + the transition-map well-definedness gate).
`grassmannianScheme` itself stays a **typed `sorry`** — `Scheme.GlueData` additionally needs the
`t'` triple-overlap **data** field, and a `sorry` in any data field ships a junk scheme (banned),
so no fake `D` was assembled. Correct discipline call (same as iter-005 grassmannianScheme judgment).

### Layer built (steps 1–5)
- `GrassChart := Fin d ↪ Fin r` (step 1); `GrassVars := Fin d × {q // q ∉ range ⇑I}` (step 2).
- `grassChartRing = of (MvPolynomial (ULift GrassVars) ℤ)`, `grassChart = Spec …` — GlueData `U` (3).
- `grassFrame` (d×r frame `X^I`); `grassFrame_minor_self : (grassFrame I).submatrix id ⇑I = 1`.
- `grassMinor I J = det((grassFrame I).submatrix id ⇑J)` (`P^I_J`, 4); `grassMinor_self`.
- `grassOverlapRing := Localization.Away (grassMinor I J)`; `grassOverlap = Spec …` — GlueData `V`.
- `grassInclusion = Spec.map (algebraMap …)` — GlueData `f`; `IsOpenImmersion` instance PROVEN.
- `grassFrameLoc`, `grassMinorMatrixLoc`; `grassMinorMatrixLoc_det`, `_isUnit_det` (`X^I_J ∈ GL_d`).
- `grassTransMatrix := (X^I_J)⁻¹ * X^I`; `grassTransMatrix_submatrix_self`.
- `grassTransAux : ℤ[X^J] →+* ℤ[X^I,1/P^I_J]`; `grassTransAux_map_frame` (`θ(X^J)=(X^I_J)⁻¹X^I`).
- **GATE** `grassTransAux_minor_isUnit : IsUnit (grassTransAux (grassMinor J I))` — hardest blocker,
  closed: `θ(P^J_I)=det((X^I_J)⁻¹)=Ring.inverse(unit)`.
- `grassTrans = Localization.awayLift …`; `grassTransMorphism` — GlueData `t`.

### Attempts / dead-ends (see milestones.jsonl for full code/errors)
- `ext` over `MvPolynomial`-valued matrices over-recurses into `MvPolynomial.coeff` → use
  `refine Matrix.ext fun … => ?_`; prefer `change` over `show` (defeq + no readability warning).
- `rw [grassMinor]`/`rw [grassTransAux]` fail ("equation theorems" on plain `def`) → `unfold` /
  `simp only [theDef]` / `show … from rfl`.
- `RingHom.mapMatrix` is **square-only**; the d×r frame needs plain `Matrix.map`. Keep
  `RingHom.map_det`/`mapMatrix` for the square d×d submatrix only. (Lemma renamed
  `grassTransAux_mapMatrix_frame` → `grassTransAux_map_frame`.)
- Proof-irrelevant subtype `X ⟨q,a⟩ = X ⟨q,b⟩` from `simp only [grassFrame, dif_neg]` does not
  auto-close → don't assert the subtype proof; `unfold … ; rw [dif_neg hq, eval₂Hom_X']` closes by defeq.
- `open Classical in` cannot sit between a doc-comment and a `def`; unneeded (Fintype gives Decidable).

## DAG / structural
- `gaps`=0, `frontier`=0/0 (every remaining sorry foundation-gated, except this in-progress BUILD).
- **`unmatched`=22** — coverage debt: all 22 new helpers are `lean_aux` with no blueprint entry.
  Listed in `recommendations.md` for the planner to blueprint (I do not author prose).
- **blueprint-doctor (STRUCTURAL, will crash `leanblueprint web`):** undefined macros — `\NN`,
  `\relproj` in `Basic.tex`; `\range` in `Functors.tex`. Surfaced to planner + TO_USER.

## Key findings
- The transition-map gate (well-definedness of `θ_{I,J}`) — historically the hardest part of an
  explicit Grassmannian glue — is now a proven, axiom-clean lemma. The remaining GlueData work
  (`f_id`, `t_id`, `t'`, `t_fac`, `cocycle`) is mechanical and dischargeable from already-proven
  `grassmannian_cocycle` + the new layer.
- `Scheme.GlueData` and all needed Mathlib lemmas exist — this is NOT a Mathlib gap; the BUILD is
  finishable next iter.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. (No `\mathlibok` candidate — all 22 are genuine proofs, not re-exports. No rename touches an
  existing blueprint `\lean{…}` — the renamed helper was never blueprinted. No stale `\notready`.)
- `sync_leanok` (iter=6) ran on current tree: added 0, removed 1 (`Functors.tex`) — deterministic;
  not laundering (a removal). Left as-is.

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: (P1) planner blueprint the 22 helpers + fix 3 undefined macros;
(P2) finish `grassmannianScheme := D.glued` (f_id/t_id/t'/t_fac/cocycle) — highest-value, axiom-free,
all infra in hand; (P3) settle relativeProj `_V` locally-free re-sign, then open that BUILD.
